title: Luffy’s Dream Shocks Coby
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Luffy and Coby aboard Alvida’s ship, where Coby’s fear begins turning into a dream of his own.
scene: Luffy’s arrival disrupts Alvida’s ship and gives Coby the first real chance to say what he wants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh... CAPTAIN! WE HAVE AN INTRUDER!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YEAH! That good fornothin' kobby brought that strange fellerhere!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: WHAT!? could he be a bounty hunter...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: ...After the price on my head?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: KOBY! You traitor- OUS LITTLE RUNT!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: But the only bounty hunter bold enough to come here...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: THAT'S RIDICULOUS!! THE Navy HAS HIM LOOKED UP...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: BUT if he's as clever as they say... he might've escaped!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: and they say that the infamous RORDNOA ZOLO is that clever!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: UM... ARE YOU OKAY? ARE YOU HURT?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: AFTER GETTING KNOCKED AROUND SO MUCH YOU MUST BE-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm fine, just a little surprised is all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: My name's Luffy! Where am I?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: THIS ISLAND IS THE HIDEOUT OF IRON MACE ALVICA, THE LADY PIRATE.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I'M KOBY, HER CABIN BOY.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: KOBY the cabin boy

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, none of that really matters to me.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: OH...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You wouldn't happen to have a dinghy, would you? Mine got sucked into a giant whirlpool.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: You got sucked into a giant whirlpool!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah, it caught me by surprise!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: You're lucky to be alive!

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: ...BUT IF IT'S A DINGAY YOU WANT, I HAVE ONE... SORTA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHAT'S THIS!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A COFFIN?

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: I built it myself. It took me two years...

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Two YEARS!? And you don't want it?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ... I REALLY DON'T NEED IT ANYMORE. I BUILT IT TOESCAPE FROM THIS PLACE...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...but I don't have the courage to try it. I guess it's my fate to be a cabin boy for the rest of my life.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: but I once had a different dream.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WHY DON'T YOU JUST ESCAPE?

summary: Luffy’s confidence contrasts with Coby’s fear. The section is about Coby slowly realizing that his dream is possible once someone refuses to treat Alvida as unbeatable.
